## Checklist

- [ ] i18n keys added/updated in both `en-US.ts` and `fr-FR.ts` (if applicable)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing change)
